description_long: This rifle features a cylindrical metal receiver and barrel, with a prominent rectangular magazine well extending downward. The stock and pistol grip are made of a reddish-brown wood, with the stock having a simple, slightly curved design. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a plain muzzle with no visible attachments. The trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver, and the overall construction appears robust and utilitarian. There are no advanced sighting systems or rail attachments visible, giving the weapon a classic, minimalist appearance.
description: A utilitarian rifle with a cylindrical metal body, wooden stock and grip, and a long, plain barrel. The design is simple and functional, with no advanced attachments.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and a glimpse of the wooden stock behind.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the barrel, the wooden stock, pistol grip, and the rectangular magazine well.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the end of the wooden stock and the slim profile of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden stock, grip, and the length of the barrel.
